content.en:
"That's right, this is the companion treasure of the Silver Horn Ancestral God in the early stage of the universe!"

Ye Tian said.

Agni Tianzun was a little surprised, and said: "The name of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, I have also heard of it, it is the top ten powerful ancestral gods at the beginning, I didn't expect you to be so lucky, even the companion treasure of the Silver Horn Ancestor God has been obtained." Nowadays, the companion treasures of the ancestral gods are basically in the hands of some innate gods or powerful supremes, or they are buried in the tomb of the ancestral gods, and it is not easy to obtain a companion treasure of the ancestral gods. The damage to this Companion Arcana Broken Sword of yours is not very serious, and I am sure that it will be transformed into a pseudo-top-level Arcana level. However, it will take some time to transform the associated Arcana, so you can come back and get it after a hundred years!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian left.

When Ye Tian left, he also took the Bright Moon Fairy with him.

After returning to the Heavenly Pavilion, Ye Tian introduced the Bright Moon Fairy and the people of the Heavenly Pavilion.

The people of the Heavenly Pavilion were very surprised to learn that the descendant of the Flame Heavenly Venerable, the famous refiner of the human race, the Bright Moon Fairy, had actually joined the Heavenly Pavilion.

And this news gradually spread out, causing an uproar in the outside world.

Many forces don't understand why Bright Moon Fairy's identity would join Tiange, even if he joins the nine supreme-level forces, he can be regarded as a guest!

The potential of Tiange is great, but I don't know how many years it will take to grow!

Heavenly Pavilion couldn't help Fairy Mingyue, it would only drag down her cultivation.

However, what the outside world didn't know was that the Bright Moon Fairy had successfully improved his cultivation talent by using the Heavenly Dao Mu Xin that Ye Tian had traded, and if they knew, they wouldn't be surprised at all.

If it were them, they would not hesitate to join Tiange.

And the Bright Moon Fairy didn't say the reason, except for occasionally helping Tiange refine some weapons, he spent the rest of his time in retreat and cultivation, preparing to attack the Universe God Realm in a few days.

And Ye Tian is often in retreat, he has too many aspects to cultivate, and he is improving his strength every moment, as if it is endless.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian came to the Agni Heavenly Palace.

Soon, he met the Flame Heavenly Venerable.

"Allah, your companion Supreme Treasure Broken Sword I have successfully transformed into a sword weapon!"

The Flame Celestial Venerable took out the modified weapon.

Ye Tian took the knife and felt it carefully.

Rumble!!!!!

An unimaginable sword aura surged above the knife, as if what he was holding in his hand was not a knife, but a world of knives.

"Good knives!"

Ye Tian praised.

The level of this sword weapon had reached the level of a pseudo-top-level supreme treasure, and it was very complete, if it weren't for the fact that the aura of this knife was the same as the aura of the accompanying supreme treasure broken sword before, he even suspected that Agni Tianzun had taken a pseudo-top-level supreme treasure sword weapon to him at will.

This also shows that the Flame Heavenly Venerable's refining attainment is too high, and it has almost completely changed the ability of the accompanying supreme treasure.

"Thank you, Flame Venerable!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

With this pseudo-top-level treasure sword, the power of his Chaotian Sword can be brought into full play to a greater extent, and his strength is even stronger than before.

"It's nothing, we're a fair deal!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Flame Heavenly Palace and returned to the Tianlan Giant City Heavenly Pavilion.

In the following years, Ye Tian took on the task of the Divine Blade Alliance to hone himself, and at the same time cultivated to strengthen his strength, making his cultivation closer and closer to the limit of the galaxy level.

At the same time, Ye Tian was growing rapidly in all aspects, and no one except him knew how terrifying his true combat power was.

......

Deep in the black hole in the center of the universe, the world of ruins.

Usually, there are no living beings here, and all races in the universe will not come here, but there are strong people guarding here, and every once in a while, there is a Tianzun guarding this place, and each race rotates.

And at this time, guarding this place is a Heavenly Venerable of the Protoss-Bright Blue Sky Venerable!

The Celestials didn't need to do anything else to guard this place, they just needed to make sure that there were no accidents here, or to prevent some powerful people from entering this place.

Except for these things, the rest of the time is in retreat and cultivation, and when the term of office is over, he will hand over to the other Heavenly Venerables and he can leave.

But on this day, Ming Lantian Venerable woke up from his cultivation.

"What's going on?"

He looked at the central black hole in shock and felt a powerful wave coming from him.

"Someone has infiltrated inside? No, all the races have arranged formations here, it is not realistic to sneak in, and they want to sneak in without me, unless they are the top supremes, but the top supremes will not be so boring!"

Rumble!!!!

The central black hole began to vibrate, and a terrifying aura spread out.

At the same time, the origin of the universe also shook.

Ming Lantian Zun sensed the danger and hurriedly sent a message.

At this moment, a figure walked out from the depths of the central black hole.

Soon, Ming Lantian Venerable saw the person coming clearly.

This person exudes a terrifying aura of divine power, his eyes are golden, his skin is also golden, and he is holding a spear, like a supreme god of war!

"The Golden God Clan, how could it be, wasn't the Golden God Clan the strongest clan in the last cosmic era?"

Ming Lantian Venerable was frightened.

As one of the high-level leaders of the Protoss, they have a lot of information about the last cosmic era, such as the last cosmic era, there are several powerful races, the first is the Golden God Race, the second is the Immortal God Race, and the third is the Sub-God Race.

And the Golden Protoss is like the status of the Protoss in the universe now, but according to some inheritance information, the Golden Protoss has evolved several times in the late stage of the universe, which is much more terrifying than the current Protoss.

And the person in front of him was a supreme of the Golden God Clan, and the aura on his body made him feel desperate.

"Definitely comparable to the most powerful gods!"

Ming Lantian Venerable was terrified.

Soon, he was about to flee.

"Celestial Venerables of this cosmic era, use your life to announce our return!"

The supreme of the Golden God Clan held the spear and poked it, crossing time and space, and piercing the Ming Lantian Venerable with a single blow.

In the next moment, Ming Lantian Venerable's body turned into ashes, and he was killed by a single blow.

Another part of the universe.

An ancient temple appeared in the void, and it was the Yuan Gu Temple.

Then, an ancient figure walked out of the Yuan Ancient Palace, and his aura covered the star fields.

Everywhere there are types of situations, and the entire universe has changed dramatically.

However, Ye Tian didn't know all this was happening.

Ten years later, Ye Tian was summoned by the Kunwu Supreme.
